file_title: AI Integration for Enhanced Cyber Resilience
introduction: As we aim to fortify our cyber resilience in line with the 2025 CSCP, let's explore the integration of a new AI anomaly detection tool into our existing infrastructure. This presentation will outline the key considerations to ensure seamless integration and continuous healthcare service delivery.

subsections.heading: Evolving Cyber Threat Landscape and Anomaly Detection
subsections.content:
• An issue previously encountered during AI integration was an increase in false positives, leading to the unnecessary isolation of crucial medical systems.
• This necessitates the development of a robust filtering system to distinguish genuine threats from benign anomalies.
• Over time, model bias or drift was identified, leading to unnoticed real threats - a potential risk that needs to be addressed during the AI integration phase.
• The failure to integrate data with legacy hospital systems was another significant challenge in monitoring coverage.
• To prevent this, ensuring seamless data integration between the new AI system and existing infrastructure will be essential.
• Given the importance of uninterrupted healthcare service, it is critical to address these issues proactively to prevent operational disruptions.
• It is important to revisit and refine our approach periodically to adapt to the evolving cyber threat landscape.
subsections.justification: The content addresses the considerations needed during AI integration, providing insights into potential issues and mitigation strategies, thus answering the DR Question.

subsections.heading: AI Integration: Challenges and Solutions
subsections.content:
• Identification of barriers to AI integration in the healthcare sector
• Examination of success stories of AI integration in other industries
• Analysis of the financial implications of AI integration
• Overview of regulations and compliance requirements for AI in healthcare
• Exploration of potential solutions to overcome AI integration challenges
• Discussion on the future of AI in healthcare
subsections.justification: While this slide discusses challenges and solutions of AI integration in general, it doesn't provide specific considerations for MediConn's situation.

subsections.heading: Plan for Uninterrupted Healthcare Service Delivery
subsections.content:
• Highlight of the importance of continuity in healthcare service delivery
• Review of the impact of service disruptions on patient satisfaction
• Description of strategies employed by other healthcare providers to ensure uninterrupted service
• Presentation of key metrics for measuring service continuity
• Analysis of the role of technology in maintaining service continuity
• Discussion on the potential of AI in improving service continuity
subsections.justification: This content focuses on service continuity in general and doesn't provide any specific considerations for integrating an AI tool without disrupting services.

conclusion: In conclusion, the integration of AI for anomaly detection is a strategic step towards enhancing our cyber resilience. Our next steps will involve detailed risk assessment, careful planning, and rigorous testing to ensure a smooth transition and minimal disruption to our healthcare services.
